verses.text: He is to draw Jerusalem on a tile, lay siege-works against it, and set an iron pan as a wall — 'a sign to the house of Israel.' Acted prophecy. God makes the coming siege visible before it comes.
He is to draw Jerusalem on a tile, lay siege-works against it, and set an iron pan as a wall — 'a sign to the house of Israel.' Acted prophecy. God makes the coming siege visible before it comes.
He is to draw Jerusalem on a tile, lay siege-works against it, and set an iron pan as a wall — 'a sign to the house of Israel.' Acted prophecy. God makes the coming siege visible before it comes.
He must lie on his left side for Israel's years of sin, then his right for Judah, bearing their iniquity by the day. A patient burden. The prophet enacts the long account of the people's guilt.
He must lie on his left side for Israel's years of sin, then his right for Judah, bearing their iniquity by the day. A patient burden. The prophet enacts the long account of the people's guilt.
He must lie on his left side for Israel's years of sin, then his right for Judah, bearing their iniquity by the day. A patient burden. The prophet enacts the long account of the people's guilt.
He sets his face toward the besieged city, and God binds him so he cannot turn till the days are finished. Fixedness. The sign must be carried through to the end, as the judgment surely will be.
He sets his face toward the besieged city, and God binds him so he cannot turn till the days are finished. Fixedness. The sign must be carried through to the end, as the judgment surely will be.
He bakes coarse bread by measure and drinks water by measure — 'the bread of their affliction.' Scarcity foretold. The siege will bring rationing and want to a careless city.
He bakes coarse bread by measure and drinks water by measure — 'the bread of their affliction.' Scarcity foretold. The siege will bring rationing and want to a careless city.
He bakes coarse bread by measure and drinks water by measure — 'the bread of their affliction.' Scarcity foretold. The siege will bring rationing and want to a careless city.
He bakes coarse bread by measure and drinks water by measure — 'the bread of their affliction.' Scarcity foretold. The siege will bring rationing and want to a careless city.
So Israel shall eat defiled bread among the heathen; at Ezekiel's protest, God allows cow's dung for fuel instead. A small mercy. God hears the cry of His servant even amid stern signs.
So Israel shall eat defiled bread among the heathen; at Ezekiel's protest, God allows cow's dung for fuel instead. A small mercy. God hears the cry of His servant even amid stern signs.
So Israel shall eat defiled bread among the heathen; at Ezekiel's protest, God allows cow's dung for fuel instead. A small mercy. God hears the cry of His servant even amid stern signs.
God will 'break the staff of bread'; they shall eat and drink in fear and waste away for their iniquity. Want exposes guilt. Sin at last consumes the body as it has the soul.
